ground_truth.title: Open Banking API Adoption and Consumer Financial Outcomes: Evidence from PSD2
ground_truth.abstract: Using transaction-level data from the EU Payment Services Directive 2 rollout, we estimate the causal effect of open banking API adoption on consumer saving behavior, credit access, and financial literacy.
